response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js work shows systems thinking, but not the specific low-level, high-performance routing tile systems needed.
strengths: Built and maintained open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Proven ability to work across languages and stacks, including systems-level DLang and Linux
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling with practical engineering rigor
concerns: No demonstrated professional experience with C++ or Rust in production routing or geospatial pipelines
Lacks explicit experience with distributed systems concepts like consistency, service discovery, or fault tolerance in navigation contexts
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not the low-latency, high-throughput systems required for routing tiles
